message:
feat(vector): add vector index writer for persistent embeddings

- Add write_vector_index() function to emit .idx file during indexing
- Add load_all_embeddings_raw() to preserve F16 bytes without float drift
- Wire vector index writer into cmd_index after embedding generation
- Add 6 unit tests for writer functionality (empty, single, ordering, determinism, header)
- Includes encode/decode_doc_type helpers for compact type storage

Implements xf-67.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
